reference_answer: Claim Review CR-5 confirmed that bed B-9 received compost batch CB-2 on July 10.
The contamination claim is unsupported because the review has no lab certificate, no odor log, and no complaint form tied to CB-2.
The committee resolved the missing-tools report as a sign-out mismatch, not a loss.
The shed lock photo showing the latch intact ruled out a broken-lock cause.
The irrigation reading for July 11 is unknown.
The volunteer who moved the spare hose is unstated.
The pest-observation line was amended from aphids on bed B-9 to aphids on bed B-6.
The draft claim that B-9 needed quarantine was withdrawn.
The interim harvest ranking remains provisional until Saturday weights are entered.
No quarantine for B-9 superseded the earlier quarantine label.
